name: Dodge 'N' Dash
short_description: Dodge 'N' Dash is a fast-paced endless arcade styled game in which you have to dodge blocks, collect coins, and grab powerups all while attempting to get the highest score possible!
detailed_description:
Dodge 'N' Dash is a fast-paced endless arcade styled game in which you have to dodge blocks, collect coins, and grab powerups all while attempting to get the highest score possible! The game has 18 unique modifiers/sub-modifiers you can unlock that spice up the gameplay as well as 13 different powerups/hazards to provide you with an advantage/disadvantage during a run. There are 3 difficulties, a randomizer mode, a classic mode, and 39 different skins you can earn through points and completing challenges!

Leave feedback/suggestions in the comments!

Demo contains Easy, Normal, and Hard difficulties, the first 3 modifiers, and the first 9 powerups/hazards.

Huge thanks to Snowy_Dragoon for helping with the powerup/hazard icons, some of the skins, and most of the steam achievement icons! 

You can check out her stuff by searching Snowy_Dragoon on Itch!
